# Module 3

Module 3 introduces Cytoscape for network visualization and enrichment-map analysis.

## Lecture

- **Module 3 — Cytoscape Lecture & Lab (Diogo Pellegrina):** [PPTX](content-files/slides/PNA_CalSask-2605_Module3_lecture_and_lab.pptx)

## Lab

- **Module 3 — Cytoscape Lab:** [Download Lab3.zip](content-files/labs/Lab3.zip)
- **BIOGRID organism database:** [Download BIOGRID-ORGANISM-5.0.257.tab3.zip](https://downloads.thebiogrid.org/Download/BioGRID/Release-Archive/BIOGRID-5.0.257/BIOGRID-ORGANISM-5.0.257.tab3.zip)
